Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Publish notifications or downstream tasks only from durable outbox or equivalent committed evidence with stable idempotency keys.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Postcommit Effects model · Theory Feed Ts Postco…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A safe HTTP fetch makes every later side effect retry safe.
